channel.title: Articles on Hyden's Dev Story'
channel.description: Recent content in Articles on Hyden's Dev Story'

item.title: 6. Google Analytics
item.description: Digital garden theme utilizes the Hugo’s [internal template](internal templates) for Google analytics and so both Google analytics v3 and GA v4 (gtag) are supported. Add your UA-PROPERTY_ID or G-MEASUREMENT_ID to config.toml Google Analytics v3 (analytics.js) googleAnalytics = 'UA-PROPERTY_ID' Google Analytics v4 (gtag.js) googleAnalytics = 'G-MEASUREMENT_ID' → Configure Metatags
